pages.text: Lucky loves cake. He is so happy that the Great Cake Contest is in town. “What cake can I bake?” he thinks.

blocks.text: Lucky loves cake. He is so happy that the Great Cake Contest is in town.
“What cake can I bake?” he thinks.

pages.text: “I know. I can make a pancake!” shouts Lucky. He walks to Pontsho’s house to share his idea, but she already beat him to it.

blocks.text: “I know. I can make a pancake!” shouts Lucky.
He walks to Pontsho’s house to share his idea, but she already beat him to it.

pages.text: “Or, what if I made a carrot cake?” he wonders. He goes to tell Nini his plan, but she had the same idea.

blocks.text: “Or, what if I made a carrot cake?” he wonders.
He goes to tell Nini his plan, but she had the same idea.

pages.text: “What about baking a black forest cake?” He rushes to tell Kima what he’s come up with, but he’s too late.

blocks.text: “What about baking a black forest cake?”
He rushes to tell Kima what he’s come up with, but he’s too late.

pages.text: On the way to Nthabi’s house, he thinks: “Let me just make a Christmas cake!” But Nthabi already made that happen.

blocks.text: On the way to Nthabi’s house, he thinks: “Let me just make a Christmas cake!”
But Nthabi already made that happen.

pages.text: “What other cake can I bake?” he asks himself. “How about a chocolate mousse cake?” He arrives at Linda’s house but oh no! He was too slow.

blocks.text: “What other cake can I bake?” he asks himself.
“How about a chocolate mousse cake?”
He arrives at Linda’s house but oh no! He was too slow.

pages.text: Lucky gets an idea. “I will make a roly-poly cake.” He gets to Zola’s house but she’s way ahead of him.

blocks.text: Lucky gets an idea. “I will make a roly-poly cake.”
He gets to Zola’s house but she’s way ahead of him.

pages.text: Lucky feels sad when he gets home because he is out of ideas. He asks his family to help him think about what great cake he can bake.

blocks.text: Lucky feels sad when he gets home because he is out of ideas. He asks his family to help him think about what great cake he can bake.

pages.text: Mama, Papa and his big sister Musa all put their heads together to help him enter the Great Cake Contest.

blocks.text: Mama, Papa and his big sister Musa all put their heads together to help him enter the Great Cake Contest.

pages.text: The cake is so big, so wide, so tall ... ... that it begins to wobble, wobble, wobble and fall!

blocks.text: The cake is so big, so wide, so tall ...
... that it begins to wobble, wobble, wobble and fall!

pages.text: Oh no! Everyone at the Great Cake Contest is covered in cake. Where are the judges? Where are the contestants? Where is Lucky?

blocks.text: Oh no! Everyone at the Great Cake Contest is covered in cake.
Where are the judges?
Where are the contestants?
Where is Lucky?

pages.text: The judges munch and chomp their way out and everyone agrees: Lucky is the winner of the Great Cake Contest!

blocks.text: The judges munch and chomp their way out and everyone agrees:
Lucky is the winner of the Great Cake Contest!
What cake would you bake?
